name: AT&S AG
lede: AT&S runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Mysuru, covering it and manufacturing.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AT&S office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AT&S AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AT&S runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Mysuru), covering it and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Functional Head - Maintenance ( Production Utility and Facility)

about.description: AT&S's India footprint covers Pune and Mysuru, spanning it and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AT&S operate in India?
faq.a: AT&S operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AT&S have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AT&S's India GCC footprint spans Pune and Mysuru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AT&S run in India?
faq.a: AT&S runs it and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AT&S's India GCCs?
faq.a: AT&S's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AT&S's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 5 leaders at AT&S's India centers, across Finance, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
